qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD01_CURSOS.oi_curso AS ID, ORG06_CURSOS.c_curso AS CODE, ORG06_CURSOS.d_curso AS TEXT FROM CYD01_CURSOS, ORG06_CURSOS JOIN CYD01_CURSOS.oi_curso INNER ORG06_CURSOS.oi_curso WHERE CYD01_CURSOS.oi_curso = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD01_CURSOS.oi_curso AS ID, ORG06_CURSOS.c_curso AS CODE, ORG06_CURSOS.d_curso AS TEXT FROM ORG06_CURSOS, CYD01_CURSOS JOIN CYD01_CURSOS.oi_curso INNER ORG06_CURSOS.oi_curso WHERE ORG06_CURSOS.c_curso={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_CURSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Cursos.CURSO\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD01_CURSOS.oi_curso AS ID, ORG06_CURSOS.c_curso AS CODE, ORG06_CURSOS.d_curso AS TEXT FROM ORG06_CURSOS, CYD01_CURSOS JOIN ORG06_CURSOS.oi_curso INNER CYD01_CURSOS.oi_curso ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY_CURSO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Cursos.CURSO\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
